overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk city district. The player character moves from a rooftop ledge down through industrial corridors into a bustling underground market with food stalls, past a fighting ring and gym area, and ends at a gun store with heavy red neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway overlooking neon-lit streets

events.description: moving from open rooftop ledge into enclosed stairwell

agents.ego_description: moving along a high ledge overlooking neon-lit city streets, then descending a graffiti-covered stairwell

entered.detail: purple neon sign with 'TOMBL' text on distant building
red neon sign for steakhouse on upper building facade
white concrete safety railing with red graffiti tags
wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
dark entrance to interior stairwell with metal handrails

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high rooftop ledge overlooking a cyberpunk cityscape at night, with prominent neon signs visible in the distance. The camera moves along the concrete railing before entering and descending a stairwell, transitioning from the open exterior to an enclosed interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with security checkpoint

events.description: encountering security personnel standing along corridor walls
approaching brighter lit area at end of corridor with purple ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit industrial corridor with exposed ceiling pipes, passing security guards and approaching a doorway

notable_agents.action: security guard standing against wall with weapon visible
person in dark clothing walking away down the corridor

entered.detail: exposed metal pipes and ductwork running along ceiling
metal security gate with yellow caution stripes on floor
illuminated vending machine with green display lights
long industrial fluorescent light fixtures on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow industrial corridor with exposed piping and concrete floors. Security personnel stand along the walls as the player approaches a security gate and doorway leading to a more brightly lit area with purple ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground market with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into open market area with blue neon lighting
passing food stalls with visible vendors and customers

agents.ego_description: walking through a bustling neon-lit market district, passing various food stalls and pedestrians, with dialogue options briefly appearing on screen

notable_agents.action: vendor working at food stall with green 'BELOW' neon sign
customer standing at food counter browsing menu

entered.detail: red neon sign with asian characters indicating 24-hour service
food vendor stall with curved roof and green neon signage
green neon sign advertising beer
massive structural concrete pillar supporting overhead structures
vending machine with weapon advertisements and orange lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant underground market bathed in blue and purple neon light. The camera moves past food stalls including one with a prominent 'BELOW' sign, while pedestrians browse and walk through the commercial area. A large concrete pillar dominates the center of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground fighting arena with gym equipment and boxing ring

events.description: entering large open chamber with fighting ring and gym equipment
approaching weightlifting area with person lifting barbell

agents.ego_description: exploring an underground fighting ring area, observing a weightlifter and the boxing arena, moving around scattered debris

notable_agents.action: muscular person lifting large weight plates on barbell
fighter in boxing ring preparing for match

entered.detail: raised platform boxing ring with yellow ropes and padding
massive digital billboard displaying 'RHYNE' advertisement with bright white light
weight plates and barbell on rack with green ambient lighting
weightlifting bench with yellow and black safety bars
red neon sign with 'FUJITSU' text
litter and debris scattered across concrete floor including bottles and cans

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a large open underground arena featuring a central boxing ring illuminated by spotlights. To the right, a weightlifter works out near bench press equipment under green fluorescent lights. A massive digital screen displays advertisements overhead, while trash and debris litter the concrete floor around the fighting area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with gun store and heavy red neon signage

events.description: entering red-lit commercial corridor with prominent gun store signage
camera tilts upward to look at overhead steam pipes and neon signs

agents.ego_description: approaching the '2nd Amendment' gun store and looking up at the steam pipes and neon signage overhead

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading '2ND AMENDMENT' with gun logo
storefront with glass windows displaying weapons and red interior lighting
industrial pipes releasing steam and smoke near ceiling
blue neon arrow pointing left
tall industrial pipes running up building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching a gun store with a prominent red '2ND AMENDMENT' neon sign. The area is bathed in red light with steam rising from overhead pipes. The camera then tilts upward to reveal the industrial piping and atmospheric steam against the night sky between buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high, open rooftop into the neon-drenched depths of a vibrant underground market. It begins on a concrete ledge overlooking a sprawling nighttime cityscape before moving inward and descending a stairwell, transitioning from the open air to an enclosed interior. As the camera progresses, the environment shifts into a narrow industrial corridor characterized by exposed piping and security personnel guarding a gate. The scene then opens into a brightly lit commercial hub bathed in blue and purple ambient light, moving past a large central concrete pillar and various food stalls, including one marked with a prominent BELOW sign, amidst a crowd of pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty underground combat arena into a steam-filled industrial alleyway dominated by red neon. It begins by entering a large open space where spotlights illuminate a central boxing ring and green fluorescent lights cast a glow over a weightlifter and gym equipment. As the camera moves past a massive overhead advertisement screen and debris-strewn concrete, the environment shifts from the open arena toward a more enclosed corridor. The scene then opens onto a gun store marked by a prominent red 2ND AMENDMENT neon sign, bathing the surrounding area in a deep crimson light. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the rising steam of overhead pipes to reveal the industrial infrastructure against the dark night sky.
